findings.issue: cash flow management on a $100/month budget is risky
findings.recommended_fix: Explore cost-saving measures or funding options to ensure financial stability

findings.issue: 3am work sessions may lead to burnout
findings.recommended_fix: Establish a sustainable work schedule and prioritize self-care

findings.issue: rapid decision-making may lead to oversights
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a decision-making framework to ensure thorough consideration of options
